title: ProtectMyPet
description: A plugin that allows you to disable damage to your pet.
body:
# ProtectMyPet - Complete Pet Protection & Management

**ProtectMyPet** is a lightweight and powerful plugin designed to solve one main problem: keeping your loyal companions safe. It not only protects them from *all* types of damage but also gives you convenient tools to manage them, ensuring your pets are never lost again.

---

## Core Features

* **Total Damage Protection:** Pets are fully protected from all threats: attacks from other players and mobs, fire, lava, fall damage, potions, and other environmental hazards.

* **"Domestication" System:** Make any passive animal (cow, sheep, chicken) your personal pet simply by right-clicking it with a bone. These animals also receive full protection, and their status persists across server restarts.

* **Summon Command `/petcall`:** Never lose your pets again! Use the command to instantly teleport all of your animals to your location.

---

## For Server Admins

* **Flexible Configuration:** The plugin comes with a detailed `config.yml` file that allows you to customize every feature:
    * Enable or disable damage from the pet's owner.
    * Activate or deactivate the domestication feature.
    * Configure the cooldown, cost (in XP), and range for the `/petcall` command.

* **Permissions Support:** Access to the summon command is controlled via the `protectmypet.command.call` permission node (defaults to OP only).

* **Lightweight Design:** The plugin is designed to have a minimal impact on server performance.

---

## Commands & Permissions

* `/petcall` (aliases: `/callpet`, `/pcall`) - Summons your pets.
    * **Permission:** `protectmypet.command.call`
